{{CargoOrgan
|name=Quantum Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10804
|idx=4
|description="After changing the conduction method from electricity to quantum, the nerve signal speed and nerve capacity increased by ten times. What a biological miracle!"
—Introduction to Quantum Neurology
|skill=
|hp=410
|def=41
|atk=76
|rush=49
|gene1=In explorations, 2x Time Chest Drops +2%
|gene2=In explorations, 2x Time Chest Drops +2%
|gene7=In explorations, 2x Time Chest Drops +2% (Awakened)
|}}
